lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.title: Anime Reversal Codes
lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.intro: Codes are the fastest way to scale early summons, rerolls, and upgrades in Anime Reversal. This module keeps active rewards first and separates expired promos clearly.

steps.title: Redeem UPDATE3 for Anime Reversal resources
steps.description: Use UPDATE3 to claim 10,000 Gems and 300 Rerolls after you reach Level 2 and join the XTS Production group.

steps.title: Redeem TOKYO for Anime Reversal summons
steps.description: TOKYO gives 6,000 Gems and 100 Rerolls, making it a strong boost before your first serious banner cycle.

steps.title: Redeem 3POIT5MVISITS for Anime Reversal materials
steps.description: 3POIT5MVISITS grants 2,000 Gems, 150 Rerolls, and 2,000 Black Fire for early progression routes.

steps.title: Redeem SryForBug3 in Anime Reversal
steps.description: SryForBug3 gives 100 Rerolls and 700 Black Fire and is worth claiming before trait reroll sessions.

steps.title: Redeem ATOMIC and RAID for Anime Reversal value
steps.description: ATOMIC and RAID are still useful reward codes for extra Gems and Rerolls while building your first raid roster.

steps.title: Track active versus expired Anime Reversal codes
steps.description: Keep 30KLIKES, 2MVISITS, 20KMembers, and RAGNAROK in the expired list so players avoid wasted redemption attempts.

quickTips: Anime Reversal code redemption requires joining XTS Production and reaching Level 2.
Redeem active Anime Reversal codes before pulling on banners or rerolling traits.
Pin expired Anime Reversal codes in a separate block to keep the active list clean.
Check Anime Reversal updates first because new milestone codes often launch with patches.

lucidBlocksApotheosisCrafting.title: Anime Reversal Tier List
lucidBlocksApotheosisCrafting.intro: This Anime Reversal ranking focuses on progression value, not rarity alone. Ground DPS and control support remain the strongest core in the current patch.

cards.name: Anime Reversal S Tier Core Units
cards.description: RedHair (Awaken), Ruda (Fist), Kirita (Dual), IceQueen (Empress), Igres (Elite), Song Woo (Assassin), and Rio (Dancer) anchor the strongest lineups.

cards.name: Anime Reversal A Tier Flexible Picks
cards.description: Kirita (Order), FireFist (Captain), Bacchi (Rockstar), Enjo (Golden), and Ame (Curse) remain strong when your S tier slots are incomplete.

cards.name: Anime Reversal B Tier Early Fillers
cards.description: Cha-In (Sword Dancer) and Jang-In (Flame Master) can carry early progression but are best replaced in late content.

cards.name: Anime Reversal Farm Slot Priority
cards.description: SpeedCEO keeps your economy scaling and should hold the dedicated farm slot in most long runs.

milestones: Prioritize Anime Reversal ground DPS first
Add Anime Reversal freeze or stun support second
Keep one Anime Reversal economy unit active
Review Anime Reversal tiers after every major update

lucidBlocksToolsAndWeapons.title: Anime Reversal Beginner Guide
lucidBlocksToolsAndWeapons.intro: A focused opening route saves Gems, rerolls, and materials. This Anime Reversal checklist keeps your first sessions efficient and avoids weak early investments.

items.name: Anime Reversal Beginner Step 1: Claim free resources
items.description: Join XTS Production, hit Level 2, and redeem active codes before spending on summons or rerolls.

items.name: Anime Reversal Beginner Step 2: Build around ground DPS
items.description: Ground damage remains the safest opening investment because it fits the strongest current wave clear patterns.

items.name: Anime Reversal Beginner Step 3: Keep strong early pulls
items.description: Prioritize Ruda (Fist), RedHair (Emperor), and Song Woo (Assassin) when they appear early.

items.name: Anime Reversal Beginner Step 4: Add control support
items.description: After your first DPS core, add freeze or stun support to stabilize harder wave sets and bosses.

items.name: Anime Reversal Beginner Step 5: Reserve one farm slot
items.description: SpeedCEO remains a long-term economy engine and helps your upgrades hit earlier breakpoints.

items.name: Anime Reversal Beginner Step 6: Plan first evolution
items.description: RedHair (Emperor) into RedHair (Awaken) is a high-value early project with strong stun control impact.

lucidBlocksStorageAndInventory.title: Anime Reversal Units
lucidBlocksStorageAndInventory.intro: The Anime Reversal unit module should answer one question quickly: which unit deserves your next resources for story, raids, and long runs.

solutions.name: RedHair (Awaken)
solutions.description: Top-tier control plus AOE damage, ideal for raids and long-wave pressure in Anime Reversal.

solutions.name: Ruda (Fist)
solutions.description: Reliable full-AOE scaling DPS and one of the best early-to-late investments in Anime Reversal.

solutions.name: Kirita (Dual)
solutions.description: Strong sustained burst profile for bosses and dense waves in Anime Reversal.

solutions.name: IceQueen (Empress)
solutions.description: Wave control specialist that improves total team uptime against high-pressure rounds.

solutions.name: Song Woo (Assassin)
solutions.description: Excellent long-run scaling and strong synergy with Igres in Anime Reversal boss content.

solutions.name: Igres (Elite)
solutions.description: High burst damage profile for raid bosses and hard story checkpoints.

solutions.name: RedHair (Emperor)
solutions.description: Great interim AOE unit and the core base for the RedHair (Awaken) evolution route.

solutions.name: SpeedCEO
solutions.description: Dedicated farming slot that keeps Anime Reversal teams scaling through long stages.

managementTips: Build one Anime Reversal carry and one control unit before chasing niche picks.
Treat SpeedCEO as a permanent Anime Reversal economy slot in long runs.
Invest in evolvable Anime Reversal units to protect long-term resources.
Update Anime Reversal unit priorities after every patch and banner shift.

lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.title: Anime Reversal Traits Guide
lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.intro: In Anime Reversal, traits are changed through the Mandra (Traits) NPC in the Upgrades area, and Trait Rerolls are one of the highest-value code rewards. Current pairings should match each unit's scaling style instead of chasing random rerolls.

cards.name: Anime Reversal Trait Setup: Ruda (Fist)
cards.description: Ruda (Fist) is one of the strongest Ground carries with Full AOE scaling, so Elite is the cleanest high-impact trait target.

cards.name: Anime Reversal Trait Setup: RedHair (Emperor/Awaken)
cards.description: The RedHair line stays relevant from progression into late-game clears, and Awaken adds reliable stun, so damage-first rolling has top value.

cards.name: Anime Reversal Trait Setup: Kirita (Order)
cards.description: Kirita (Order) prefers a crit-and-sustain pairing, and Zodiac is the most practical route for keeping the Order branch competitive.

cards.name: Anime Reversal Trait Setup: IceQueen (Empress)
cards.description: IceQueen provides control uptime, so lower SPA creates more value than raw damage traits on support-focused runs.

cards.name: Anime Reversal Trait Setup: FireFist (Captain)
cards.description: FireFist scales best in packed wave pressure where Burn keeps ticking, and Doom is the trait that pushes that lane-clearing profile.

cards.name: Anime Reversal Trait Setup: Bacchi (Rockstar)
cards.description: Bacchi is guaranteed through the battle pass, and lower SPA helps passive cycling, making Luna or Silence better than random stat rolls.

highlights: Anime Reversal trait rerolls come from code rewards and should be saved for long-term carries.
Anime Reversal damage traits should be prioritized on Ground DPS anchors first.
Anime Reversal freeze and stun supports gain more from SPA-focused trait rolling.
Anime Reversal Mandra reroll sessions should use a fixed budget by unit priority.

lucidBlocksWorldRegions.title: Anime Reversal Evolutions
lucidBlocksWorldRegions.intro: Anime Reversal evolutions use a mix of materials, timed NPC windows, quest chains, and portal farming. The best routes are the ones that unlock real gameplay spikes such as stun control, boss pressure, or elite secret progression.

regions.name: Anime Reversal Evolution Route: RedHair to RedHair (Awaken)
regions.materials: Haki Hat EVO item, 10,000 Gems, 10 Rerolls, and 15,000 Gold
regions.trigger: The RedHair NPC appears in the lobby once every hour for 5 minutes, and Traveller NPC provides spawn hints.
steps: Check Traveller NPC for the active RedHair spawn hint.
Find the RedHair NPC during the hourly lobby window.
Buy the Haki Hat EVO item and complete the evolution.
regions.description: RedHair (Awaken) adds reliable stun on top of strong full-AOE damage, making it one of the highest-value upgrades.

regions.name: Anime Reversal Evolution Route: Hu Tao Secret Path
regions.targetForm: Hu Tao Funeral Parlor Elite into Doom Evolved Hu Tao
regions.trigger: Finish the full Hu Tao secret quest route before advancing to the evolved Doom branch.
steps: Start the Anime Reversal Hu Tao secret unlock route.
Complete the full quest chain tied to the secret line.
Claim Hu Tao Funeral Parlor Elite.
Advance the route into Doom Evolved Hu Tao for late-game scaling.
regions.description: This evolution line is a high-interest quest grind because it moves from secret unlock into a separate evolved showcase form.

regions.name: Anime Reversal Evolution Route: QinSha, Saka, and Hadas
regions.materials: Ragnarok portals, premium tickets, and Qin Sha NPC trade route
regions.trigger: Push higher Ragnarok portal tiers, then convert progression through the Qin Sha NPC trade path.
steps: Farm Ragnarok portals consistently in loops.
Push into higher-tier portal runs for premium ticket flow.
Locate the Qin Sha NPC trade route tied to portal progression.
Convert the farm route into elite secret evolution value.
regions.description: These units become significantly stronger endgame targets once their elite secret evolution routes are online.

lucidBlocksCreaturesAndEnemies.title: Anime Reversal Secret Units
lucidBlocksCreaturesAndEnemies.intro: Anime Reversal secret units combine RNG, quests, portals, and evolution routes. The highest-interest targets are the units that become core meta carries or unlock long quest-to-evolution chains.

creatures.name: RedHair (Awaken)
creatures.obtainMethod: Start from RedHair, evolve into Emperor, then use the Haki Hat route from the timed lobby NPC.
creatures.prerequisites: RedHair (Emperor), RedHair NPC spawn, and Haki Hat EVO item
creatures.description: RedHair (Awaken) is the most important Anime Reversal secret target because it combines full-AOE pressure with reliable stun.

creatures.name: Hu Tao Funeral Parlor Elite
creatures.obtainMethod: Complete the full Hu Tao quest path, then push toward the evolved Doom showcase branch.
creatures.description: Hu Tao is one of the most searched Anime Reversal secrets because the unlock is quest-based and extends into an evolved endgame route.

creatures.name: Yoji (Modula)
creatures.obtainMethod: Chase current JJK-era update routes and secret progression content.
creatures.description: Yoji (Modula) remains a headline Anime Reversal update target with strong showcase value for current-cycle players.

creatures.name: QinSha (Emperor)
creatures.obtainMethod: Farm Ragnarok portals, then use the Qin Sha NPC route linked to premium-ticket progression.
creatures.prerequisites: Portal farming plus secret NPC trade path
creatures.description: QinSha is a portal-linked Anime Reversal secret with a clear endgame farm target instead of a basic summon-only unlock.

lucidBlocksMobilityGear.title: Anime Reversal Raids
lucidBlocksMobilityGear.intro: Anime Reversal raid and portal content is a roster check centered on CID Raid, JJK Portal, and Ragnarok portal farming. The most consistent clears still use economy opening, Ground DPS pressure, and one stall-control slot.

items.name: Anime Reversal CID Raid Strategy
items.chaseTarget: CID raid progression and consistent clear route
items.minimumCore: 1 farm unit, 2 meta Ground DPS units, and 1 freeze or stun support
wavePriorities: Open with economy first so your damage curve is stable before heavy boss waves.
Get one full-AOE Ground carry online early.
Add stall support before the boss reaches the main lane.
items.description: RedHair stun plus IceQueen freeze is the easiest control loop for stable Anime Reversal CID clears.

items.name: Anime Reversal JJK Portal Strategy
items.chaseTarget: Update 3 JJK roster routes including Gaju, Sokuna, and Yoji (Modula)
items.minimumCore: Economy plus one wave-clear carry and one boss-delete pairing
wavePriorities: Stabilize lanes first, then pivot upgrades into boss damage.
Use Song Woo and Igres together for high boss pressure.
Keep one control slot active to prevent portal overruns.
items.description: JJK Portal is the clearest current Anime Reversal route for players chasing the newest update-cycle secrets.

items.name: Anime Reversal Ragnarok Tier 8 Strategy
items.chaseTarget: QinSha route, premium tickets, and secret NPC trade progression
items.minimumCore: High-end Ground DPS lineup with one support control slot
wavePriorities: Build stable wave clear before late-portal spikes begin.
Preserve boss damage for the harder end sections.
Farm this mode in loops when targeting QinSha and elite secret routes.
items.description: Ragnarok Tier 5+ routes are important because they feed the Anime Reversal secret NPC progression tied to QinSha.

unlockMilestones: Build an Anime Reversal raid core with economy, Ground DPS, and one control slot.
Clear Anime Reversal CID Raid with stable economy pacing.
Farm Anime Reversal JJK Portal for current update chase units.
Loop Anime Reversal Ragnarok portals for QinSha and elite secret progression.

lucidBlocksFarmingAndGrowth.title: Anime Reversal Best Units
lucidBlocksFarmingAndGrowth.intro: Anime Reversal currently rewards raw ground damage more than hill play in the live meta. The safest roster path is one elite carry, one control unit, and one farm slot, then scaling into high-value evolution routes.

sections.name: Anime Reversal SS Unit: RedHair (Awaken)
sections.description: Role: Support DPS and stun control. Meta value: Massive full-AOE damage plus reliable stun that improves team uptime. Best trait: Elite. Best use: Story, raids, late-wave control, and boss pressure. Build note: If you own RedHair (Emperor), this is the top evolution target.

sections.name: Anime Reversal SS Unit: Ruda (Fist)
sections.description: Role: Ground DPS carry. Meta value: Best pure ground attacker with full-AOE coverage, high DPS, and a self-buff passive that scales in long runs. Best trait: Elite. Best use: Main carry and wave clear. Build note: Best first hyper-carry if you do not have Awakened RedHair.

sections.name: Anime Reversal SS Unit: Kirita (Dual)
sections.description: Role: Ground DPS carry. Meta value: More reliable passive than Kirita (Order), with stronger sustained and boss damage for most accounts. Best trait: Elite. Best use: Boss pressure and second carry slot. Build note: Choose Dual by default unless your materials already lock an Order route.

sections.name: Anime Reversal S Unit: IceQueen (Empress)
sections.description: Role: Support and freeze control. Meta value: One of the strongest control picks because freeze raises total team uptime even without top personal DPS. Best trait: Luna. Best use: Wave stall and safer clears. Build note: Fast-SPA traits increase freeze value.

sections.name: Anime Reversal S Unit: RedHair (Emperor)
sections.description: Role: Ground DPS and evolution bridge. Meta value: Strong AOE profile and direct path into RedHair (Awaken). Best trait: Elite. Best use: Mid-game carry and evolution setup. Build note: Value spikes once you commit to Awaken.

sections.name: Anime Reversal S Unit: SpeedCEO
sections.description: Role: Economy farm slot. Meta value: Best background money engine in the current patch and core support for long runs. Best trait: Golden. Best use: Story progression and economy pacing. Build note: Income traits outperform combat traits on this slot.

growthMilestones: Build one Anime Reversal elite carry first, then pair one control unit.
Keep one Anime Reversal farm slot active so upgrades stay on curve.
Prioritize Anime Reversal evolution targets over spreading into mid-tier duplicates.
Re-check Anime Reversal best-unit priorities after each major update.

lucidBlocksBestEarlyUnlocks.title: Anime Reversal Update Notes
lucidBlocksBestEarlyUnlocks.intro: Anime Reversal has moved through clear patch eras, with Update 2.5 and Update 3 as the most important recent milestones. Each patch cycle usually changes units, code waves, and spending priorities, so update tracking must connect directly to roster decisions.

priorities.name: Anime Reversal Update 3 (2026-04-07)
priorities.description: Headline: JJK-flavored patch with Gaju, Sokuna, and Yoji (Modula). Code wave: UPDATE3, TOKYO, 3POIT5MVISITS, and SryForBug3. Meta impact: Players reranked top-end units immediately around the new roster.

priorities.name: Anime Reversal Update 2.5 (2026-03-27)
priorities.description: Headline: Mid-season patch with Umbra Lord, Kafra, Haya, Aizo [Chrysails], Alphe, and Delty. Code wave: UPDATE2.5, ILOVEKAFRA, ATOMIC, and RAID. Meta impact: High-volume progression patch for gems and reroll usage.

priorities.name: Anime Reversal Launch to Early Patch Cycle (2025-10-17)
priorities.description: Headline: Release period that established summon, evolve, and reroll loops. Key early codes: AnimeReversal, MrRhino, JetozaCH, ZerozKingner, and RIKTIME. Meta impact: Built first viable summon pools before power spikes in 2.5 and 3.

priorities.name: Anime Reversal Update Workflow: Sync codes with patch notes
priorities.description: Every Anime Reversal patch card should include active code waves and redemption value so the codes module and update module stay aligned.

priorities.name: Anime Reversal Update Workflow: Re-rank roster priorities
priorities.description: After each major patch, update best-unit rankings, reroll targets, and gem priorities before spending on banners or traits.

lucidBlocksAchievementTracker.title: Anime Reversal Trait Rerolls
lucidBlocksAchievementTracker.intro: Trait rerolls are one of the most valuable Anime Reversal resources, so efficient planning is critical. Build a stable carry core first, reserve mythic trait pushes for top units, and use fallback traits to avoid burning your entire reroll stock.

groups.name: Anime Reversal Trait Rerolls Step 1: Unlock the code funnel first

achievements.title: Set up Anime Reversal reroll stock before hard rolling
achievements.description: Join XTS Production, reach Level 2, and redeem all active codes before starting serious trait rerolls.

achievements.title: Anime Reversal reroll source: UPDATE3
achievements.description: UPDATE3 gives 300 rerolls and should be redeemed before any major trait session.

achievements.title: Anime Reversal reroll source: TOKYO
achievements.description: TOKYO gives 100 rerolls and is a key early stockpile code.

achievements.title: Anime Reversal reroll sources: 35KLIKES, ATOMIC, RAID
achievements.description: 35KLIKES gives 200 rerolls, ATOMIC gives 200 rerolls, and RAID gives 80 rerolls.

groups.name: Anime Reversal Trait Rerolls Step 2: Chase only top-end traits

achievements.title: Anime Reversal mythic trait target: Elite (0.1%)
achievements.description: Elite is the top all-around DPS trait for core carry units.

achievements.title: Anime Reversal mythic trait target: Doom (0.15%)
achievements.description: Doom adds strong damage pressure and works well for damage-focused endgame units.

achievements.title: Anime Reversal mythic trait target: Luna (0.2%)
achievements.description: Luna improves damage, SPA, and range, and is strong on control-oriented supports.

achievements.title: Anime Reversal mythic trait targets: Zodiac (0.25%) and Silencer (0.3%)
achievements.description: Zodiac and Silencer remain strong endgame outcomes when Elite is not available.

groups.name: Anime Reversal Trait Rerolls Step 3: Prioritize reroll targets by unit value

achievements.title: Anime Reversal Priority 1: RedHair (Awaken) and RedHair (Emperor)
achievements.description: Aim for Elite first because these units drive high-value control and DPS scaling.

achievements.title: Anime Reversal Priority 2: Ruda (Fist)
achievements.description: Ruda should also target Elite as a main ground carry.

achievements.title: Anime Reversal Priority 3: Kirita (Dual)
achievements.description: Kirita (Dual) scales best with Elite for sustained boss and wave damage.

achievements.title: Anime Reversal Priority 4 and 5: Kirita (Order) and IceQueen (Empress)
achievements.description: Kirita (Order) prefers Zodiac, while IceQueen benefits most from Luna or other fast-SPA options.

groups.name: Anime Reversal Trait Rerolls Step 4: Use efficient fallback traits

achievements.title: Anime Reversal fallback trait: Golden
achievements.description: Golden is the best value fallback on SpeedCEO because economy scaling matters more than combat stats.

achievements.title: Anime Reversal fallback trait: Sniper
achievements.description: Sniper is a strong coverage trait for lower-range units.

achievements.title: Anime Reversal fallback trait: Superior
achievements.description: Superior is a workable temporary damage trait on early ground carries.

achievements.title: Anime Reversal fallback trait: Range
achievements.description: Range is a good stopgap trait when you need immediate consistency before a premium roll.

groups.name: Anime Reversal Trait Rerolls Step 5: Stop on value and move on

achievements.title: Anime Reversal hard stop rule
achievements.description: Hard stop on Elite for top carries and preserve stock for the next unit.

achievements.title: Anime Reversal soft stop rule
achievements.description: Soft stop on Luna, Doom, Zodiac, or Silencer for endgame-ready units.

achievements.title: Anime Reversal economy slot rule
achievements.description: Keep Golden on SpeedCEO instead of over-rolling economy slots.

achievements.title: Anime Reversal meta allocation rule
achievements.description: Avoid spending mythic reroll targets on hill-focused units in the current no-flying meta.

lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.title: Anime Reversal Gems Guide
lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.intro: This Anime Reversal gems guide follows a practical spending ladder: secure a real roster core first, reserve gems for high-impact evolution routes second, then optimize traits after your lineup is stable.

faqs.question: What is the top Anime Reversal gems priority for early accounts?
faqs.answer: Spend Anime Reversal gems on summons until you lock one carry, one support or control unit, and one economy slot. Strong early targets include Ruda (Fist), the RedHair line, Kirita, IceQueen, Song Woo, and SpeedCEO.

faqs.question: When should Anime Reversal gems be reserved for RedHair (Awaken)?
faqs.answer: If you own RedHair (Emperor), reserve Anime Reversal gems for the Haki Hat evolution route before impulse pulls. The key cost package is 10,000 Gems, 10 Rerolls, and 15,000 Gold.

faqs.question: When should Anime Reversal gems shift from summons to trait optimization?
faqs.answer: Start heavy Anime Reversal trait optimization only after your core roster is stable. Premium trait rolls are most efficient on proven units, not temporary fillers.

faqs.question: Which Anime Reversal gem purchases are low priority?
faqs.answer: Convenience spending is low priority in Anime Reversal. Extra comfort buys should wait until your main six-unit lineup is already strong.

faqs.question: What should Anime Reversal players skip while saving gems?
faqs.answer: Skip hill-heavy investments, weak mid-tier duplicates, and early mythic-trait gambling before your evolution plan and carry core are complete.

faqs.question: What is a simple Anime Reversal gems spending ladder?
faqs.answer: Use this Anime Reversal order: core summons first, RedHair Awaken reserve second, trait optimization third, and convenience spending last.

lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.title: Anime Reversal Summon Banners
lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.intro: Anime Reversal summon value is built around Gems first and Trait Rerolls second. Pull for reliable ground carries before chasing niche picks, then reroll only on units that stay in your long-term lineup.

cards.name: Anime Reversal Summon Currency Flow
cards.summary: Spend Gems in the summon area first, then use Trait Rerolls at Mandra after your carry core is locked.
bullets: Use UPDATE3 for 10,000 Gems and 300 Rerolls before major banner sessions.
Use TOKYO for 6,000 Gems and 100 Rerolls to extend pull windows.
Use 35KLIKES for 2,500 Gospel Pages and 200 Rerolls for upgrade pacing.
Secure one real carry with Gems before spending rerolls on traits.

cards.name: Anime Reversal Best Early Banner Targets
cards.summary: Early story progression is strongest when banners improve wave clear and stable DPS without niche setup demands.
bullets: Ruda (Fist) is a top ground DPS anchor with strong full-AOE value.
RedHair (Emperor) into RedHair (Awaken) is a long-term damage path.
Song Woo (Assassin) delivers reliable scaling in early and mid progression.
IceQueen (Empress) adds freeze control that stabilizes harder stages.

cards.name: Anime Reversal Best Long-Run Banner Targets
cards.summary: After story stabilization, shift pulls toward boss pressure and long-run consistency for infinite and raid routes.
bullets: Kirita (Dual) outperforms Kirita (Order) for sustained damage routes.
Igres (Elite) pairs with Song Woo for stronger boss-focused pressure.
Rio (Dancer) improves cleanup with bonus damage to low-HP enemies.
RedHair (Awaken) remains the best overall chase when evolution is available.

cards.name: Anime Reversal Recent Banner Pool Watchlist
cards.summary: Recent updates expanded the summon pool, so saving for patch-era banners is more valuable than random pull volume.
bullets: Update 2.5 added Umbra Lord, Kafra, Haya, Aizo [Chrysails], Alphe, and Delty.
Update 3 added Gaju, Sokuna, and Yoji (Modula).
Patch banners are the best timing for Gems saved from code waves.
Review tier impact before spending into each new banner pool.

cards.name: Anime Reversal Low-Priority Pulls Right Now
cards.summary: Current live conditions favor ground damage and control, so hill-focused pulling is a low-value use of limited Gems.
bullets: Do not center early pulls around Hill unit routes.
Jang-In and Goko are currently behind top ground options.
Spend limited Gems on wave clear, stun, freeze, and boss pressure first.
Add niche picks only after your core carry and support shell is complete.

lucidBlocksSettingsAndAccessibility.title: Anime Reversal Story Mode Guide
lucidBlocksSettingsAndAccessibility.intro: Anime Reversal story progression is smoother when you climb in phases instead of forcing random summons. Use one farm slot, two ground carries, and one control slot to keep wave management clean.

stages.goal: Stabilize income and clear opening maps without overinvesting in weak pulls.
upgradeOrder: Place SpeedCEO early for passive money generation.
Add one main ground DPS on your strongest lane.
Upgrade the first carry before placing extra low-value units.
Add second damage only when leaks start to appear.
clearTips: Ground damage is the safest early investment path.
Do not burn early Gems chasing hill-heavy setups.
One upgraded carry outperforms several weak placements.

stages.goal: Push through scaling waves and replace filler units with stable control and carry slots.
upgradeOrder: Keep one farm running while upgrades scale.
Cap your primary carry before branching into flex units.
Add IceQueen after damage baseline is stable.
Transition RedHair toward the Awaken route as early as possible.
clearTips: IceQueen freeze windows increase effective DPS uptime.
RedHair (Emperor) is worth early investment because Awaken is top-tier.
Avoid spreading upgrades too thin across the roster.

stages.goal: Scale single-target pressure while keeping enough AOE to prevent lane collapse.
upgradeOrder: Open with a proven wave-clear carry first.
Add Song Woo for scaling boss pressure.
Pair Igres when boss HP starts deciding clears.
Use IceQueen or RedHair control to extend boss exposure windows.
clearTips: Igres and Song Woo are strongest when used together.
Boss maps still punish weak wave control, so keep one AOE carry active.
Freeze and stun increase output without increasing placement count.

stages.goal: Convert a stable roster into a chapter-finishing lineup for harder maps and update stages.
upgradeOrder: Open with farm plus one carry anchor.
Bring RedHair online as your main control pivot.
Add Kirita (Dual) or Ruda for sustained boss damage.
Use remaining slots for proven supports, not novelty units.
clearTips: RedHair (Awaken) is the most reliable late-story closer.
Kirita (Dual) is the stronger sustained Kirita route.
Later chapters reward tight core teams over experimental lineups.

lucidBlocksUpdatesAndPatchNotes.title: Anime Reversal Infinite Mode
lucidBlocksUpdatesAndPatchNotes.intro: Anime Reversal Infinite Mode rewards scaling ground DPS, crowd control, and one economy slot that keeps upgrade timing ahead of wave pressure. Build carry first, control second, and boss pressure third.

cards.name: Anime Reversal Core Infinite Team
cards.summary: The most consistent long-run shell is one farm, two scaling carries, and one control anchor for stable early waves and late pressure.
bullets: Use SpeedCEO for passive economy scaling.
Run Ruda (Fist) as the primary ground DPS anchor.
Use RedHair (Awaken) and IceQueen for stun and freeze control.
Add Igres plus Song Woo when boss damage becomes critical.

cards.name: Anime Reversal Wave 1-20 Setup
cards.summary: Early Infinite runs fail when players overplace too fast. Keep the opener efficient and push upgrades before adding filler units.
bullets: Open with SpeedCEO plus one strong carry.
Upgrade your first carry before filling extra slots.
Use Ruda or Song Woo as the first reliable damage anchor.
Hold control units until leak pressure actually starts.

cards.name: Anime Reversal Wave 21-60 Stabilization
cards.summary: Mid-wave stability depends on timing freeze and stun support correctly, then converting uptime into stronger carry scaling.
bullets: Add IceQueen after your base damage profile is stable.
Bring RedHair online to stall heavier pressure lanes.
Prioritize upgrade timing over raw placement count.
Stack strongest damage on the lane with longest uptime.

cards.name: Anime Reversal Wave 60+ Boss Plan
cards.summary: Past comfort waves, boss burn and stall windows determine run depth. Duo synergy and evolved carries decide late success.
bullets: Pair Igres with Song Woo for stronger boss melts.
Keep RedHair (Awaken) active for long stun windows.
Use Kirita (Dual) as a sustained late-wave swap when needed.
Avoid late upgrades on low-scaling side units.

cards.name: Anime Reversal Current Mistakes to Avoid
cards.summary: Infinite difficulty rises quickly when team structure is weak. Build around proven core roles before experimenting with niche units.
bullets: Do not center your Infinite team around Hill unit routes yet.
Goko and Jang-In remain lower-value picks in current patches.
Add niche units only after carry, control, and boss shell is complete.
Test new additions like Gaju, Sokuna, and Yoji only after core stability.

faq.title: Anime Reversal FAQ
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Anime Reversal

questions.question: What is Anime Reversal and why is it popular?
questions.answer: Anime Reversal is a Roblox anime tower defense game focused on unit progression, trait optimization, evolutions, and raid clears.

questions.question: Where can I get active Anime Reversal codes?
questions.answer: Use the Anime Reversal codes module for active and expired code tracking, then redeem codes after meeting level and group requirements.

questions.question: Which Anime Reversal units should I build first?
questions.answer: Start with one carry DPS, then add one control support and one economy unit for consistent progression.

questions.question: How should I spend Anime Reversal rerolls and gems?
questions.answer: Prioritize stable summon milestones first, then reroll high-value traits on your long-term core units.

questions.question: What does the Anime Reversal tier list prioritize?
questions.answer: The tier list prioritizes practical performance in story, raids, and long-wave modes instead of rarity alone.

questions.question: Where are official Anime Reversal community links?
questions.answer: Use the Anime Reversal Community Links module for Discord, Roblox group, YouTube channel, and trailer access.
